meta.primary_instruction: Build SkyNetFactory exactly from this JSON contract. Treat this JSON as the single source of truth. Do not rely on prompt text for architecture details.
meta.architecture_principle: Architecture-as-Data: all durable implementation instructions must live in this JSON contract; the prompt is only a bootstrap loader.

ambiguity_resolution.rule_1: When JSON is ambiguous, prefer the path that maximizes reusability and verifiability.
ambiguity_resolution.rule_2: When two instructions conflict, the more restrictive one wins.
ambiguity_resolution.rule_3: When in doubt, log the decision in implementation notes under C:\SkynetFactory\logs\decisions\.
ambiguity_resolution.rule_5: Spirit: SkyNetFactory exists to produce verified, reusable, independently testable modules — not just working code. Every design choice should favor verifiability and composability over convenience.

extractable_schemas.note: All schemas are defined inline below for single-source-of-truth convenience. They may be extracted to separate files under C:\SkynetFactory\module-contracts\_instructions\ during Phase 2, but the inline definitions here are authoritative.

project_goal: Build a reusable-module factory that consumes standardized JSON module contracts, uses AgentSwarm as a reuse-first orchestration chassis, dispatches Ollama workers to implement standalone modules, validates them through deterministic gates, registers verified modules, and provides a UI for real-time progress.

bootstrap_rules.if_implementation_detail_missing: inspect AgentSwarm first, then make smallest reasonable adapter decision and record it in C:\SkynetFactory\logs\decisions\
bootstrap_rules.github_clone_exception: Only clone if local_agent_swarm_reference is missing or unusable; record reason in logs.

reuse_policy.summary: Reuse the local AgentSwarm repo as the orchestration chassis. Build new code only for SkyNetFactory-specific contracts, sidecars, gates, registry, Ollama adapter, and module-factory behavior.
build_new_only_for: SkyNetFactory-specific UI panels only where AgentSwarm dashboard cannot be reused or extended

required_output_before_coding.description: A reuse inventory mapping each SkyNetFactory subsystem to AgentSwarm code paths and a decision: reuse, wrap, extend, fork, or build_new.

responsibilities: Build the system from this JSON contract
Inspect local AgentSwarm and reuse code aggressively
Create standardized module contracts in pending when acting as contract factory
Provide Docker worker orchestration where reusable
Provide logs, workspaces, and dashboard/progress plumbing where reusable
Use local Ollama models through API
Implement module code, tests, sidecar, Docker config, and docs
Show live contract and module pipeline
Show logs and acceptance gate results

pending.guard: no other contract with same module_id currently in {claimed, building, testing}

concurrency_model.rule: Only one worker may process a given module_id at a time. Claim is established by creating a lockfile atomically. Lockfile must contain worker_id, claimed_at timestamp, and expected completion. Stale locks (older than lock_timeout_ms) are force-released with a warning log.

rollback_policy.on_building_enter: git commit a clean-slate snapshot tagged 'build-start-<timestamp>'
rollback_policy.on_remediation_enter: git reset --hard to last build-start tag, preserving failed attempt artifacts

retry_policy.rule: When a worker fails, wait base_delay_ms * (multiplier ^ attempt_number) before retrying. If 5 consecutive failures across any module occur, trip the circuit breaker — stop dispatching new tasks, wait reset period, then allow 1 probe task. If probe succeeds, resume. If probe fails, continue waiting.

llm_determinism.on_gate_failure: retry with incremented seed up to max_remediation_attempts, then remediation with different model if available
llm_determinism.fallback_trigger: 3 consecutive gate failures with same model
llm_determinism.note: LLM output is inherently non-deterministic. The gate engine provides the deterministic verification layer that compensates for model stochasticity. Low temperature and seed control reduce variance but do not eliminate it. The gate engine is the final authority, not the model.

startup_probes.name: ollama
startup_probes.on_failure: halt_with_error: Ollama not available at configured URL

startup_probes.name: ollama_default_model
startup_probes.validate: response contains default_model in model list
startup_probes.on_failure: warn: default model not pulled, attempt pull or fallback

startup_probes.name: agent_swarm_api
startup_probes.on_failure: warn: AgentSwarm API not reachable, will retry on task submission

health_checks.on_runtime_probe_failure: log warning and update UI health indicator; if consecutive failures exceed circuit_breaker_trip_after, pause task dispatch

module_contract_authoring_standard.principle: A module contract is not a feature request. It is a reusable capability specification.
granularity_rules: One clear reusable capability per module
Dependencies must be declared as contracts

module_contract_schema.title: SkyNetFactoryModuleContract
module_contract_schema.description: Schema for a SkyNetFactory module contract — a reusable capability specification.

category.description: Broad domain category: storage, auth, api, testing, registry, etc.

capability_type.description: The kind of capability this module provides

purpose.description: Clear, specific statement of what this module does and why it exists

reuse_scope.description: List of contexts where this module could be reused

dependencies.description: Declared dependencies on other SkyNetFactory modules or external packages

sidecar_requirements.description: Requirements for the module's sidecar metadata document

acceptance_gates.description: List of gate names that must all pass (AND logic) for module completion

extra_services.description: Additional docker-compose services needed for testing

detection_method.description: How this forbidden behavior is detected or enforced

forbidden_behaviors.description: Behaviors this module must not exhibit, with enforcement method

agent_notes.description: Hints and guidance for the implementing worker agent

base_path.description: Base URL path for HTTP APIs, e.g. /api/v1

input_schema.description: Reference name for request body schema

output_schema.description: Reference name for response body schema

endpoints.description: List of API endpoints (for http style)

cli_commands.description: List of CLI commands (for cli style)

additionalProperties.description: Named JSON Schema objects for request/response validation

schemas.description: Named schema definitions referenced by endpoints

module_id.description: SkyNetFactory module dependency, or 'npm:<package>', 'pip:<package>' for externals

optional.description: Whether the dependency is optional (graceful degradation if missing)

sidecar_schema.title: SkyNetFactoryModuleSidecar
sidecar_schema.description: Sidecar metadata for a SkyNetFactory module — usage guide for consuming agents.

composition_tags.description: Tags for module composition and discovery, e.g. storage, verification, checksum

worker_result_schema.title: SkyNetFactoryWorkerResult
worker_result_schema.description: Structured output from an Ollama worker after implementing a module.

changed_files.description: Absolute paths of all files created or modified

prompt_hash.description: SHA256 of the full prompt sent to the model

registry_entry_schema.title: SkyNetFactoryRegistryEntry
registry_entry_schema.description: A verified module entry in the SkyNetFactory registry.

path.description: Absolute path to the production module directory

contract_hash.description: SHA256 of the module.contract.json for tamper detection

agent_swarm_integration.copy_instruction: Copy or mirror local_reference_path to working_copy_path. Keep reference copy untouched.

event_streaming.description: AgentSwarm should stream task events (started, progress, partial_failure, completed) to SkyNetFactory supervisor. SkyNetFactory supervisor should be able to send remediation_guidance mid-task if supported.

rules: module_id must be included in task title and metadata
write_scope must be included and enforced after completion
acceptance gates must be included but final verification is done by SkyNetFactory gate runner
worker logs must be streamed or copied into SkyNetFactory logs

ollama_worker_adapter.goal: Let AgentSwarm schedule workers that use local Ollama models to implement modules.
tool_guards: Path traversal prevention: reject any path containing '..' or outside declared write_scope
Write-scope enforcement: all file writes must be within declared scope or module metadata paths
Command allowlist: only explicitly listed commands may be executed
Timeout enforcement: all commands must complete within configured timeout
Log every file write: record path, size, and SHA256
Log every command execution: record command, exit code, duration
Network egress monitoring: flag any network calls not declared in contract

acceptance_gate_engine.rule: AgentSwarm worker/task completion is not sufficient for module completion. Module completion requires all final gates to pass. All gates are AND logic — every gate listed in the contract's acceptance_gates array must pass.

structure_validation.pass_condition: all required module output paths exist

contract_validation.pass_condition: module.contract.json is valid JSON and schema-compliant

sidecar_validation.pass_condition: module.sidecar.json is valid JSON and schema-compliant

write_scope_validation.pass_condition: all changed files are inside declared write_scope or allowed metadata paths

forbidden_behavior_validation.pass_condition: all forbidden_behaviors in contract are checked via their declared detection_method and none are violated

detection_methods.network_egress_check: Verify no undeclared network calls via sandbox or proxy analysis
detection_methods.filesystem_mutation_diff: Diff filesystem state before and after; flag undeclared mutations
detection_methods.static_analysis: Run static analysis tools flagged in contract
detection_methods.runtime_sandbox_policy: Run module in sandbox and enforce network/filesystem policies
detection_methods.manual_review: Flag for human review (non-blocking gate — warn only)

registry_validation.pass_condition: verified registry entry can be written and read back

registry.description: Each verified module gets an individual JSON file under C:\SkynetFactory\registry\<module_id>.json. The modules.json index file contains a summary array for fast lookup. Writes are atomic (write to temp, then rename). Index is rebuilt from individual files on startup and after each registration.
operations: search(query): search index, return matching entries
deprecate(module_id, reason): update status to deprecated
supersede(old_module_id, new_module_id): update old status to superseded, register new

electron_ui.reuse_rule: Reuse or embed AgentSwarm dashboard/progress plumbing if practical. Build custom Electron panels only for SkyNetFactory-specific module contract, sidecar, gate, and registry visibility.
electron_ui.status_rule: UI must distinguish implementation attempt complete from final module verified.

contract_versioning.migration_strategy: When this contract schema changes between versions, create a migration script at C:\SkynetFactory\config\migrations\<from_version>_to_<to_version>.js that can transform an older contract file into the new format. Log all migrations. Never silently alter contract data.

change_log.changes: Initial structured contract (from prior unversioned state)

changes: Added concurrency_model with lockfile-based claim mechanism
Added rollback_policy with git worktree strategy
Added retry_policy with exponential backoff and circuit breaker
Added llm_determinism section with temperature/seed/fallback controls
Added health_checks with startup and runtime probes
Enriched contract_lifecycle with guard conditions, timeouts, and terminal state revival
Added forbidden_behavior_validation gate with detection methods
Promoted all inline schemas to proper JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12)
Added api_sub_schema with full endpoint and CLI command definitions
Added dependency_sub_schema with module_id, version_constraint, required_at, optional
Added worker_result_schema with evidence sub-object
Added registry_entry_schema
Added gate_result_schema to acceptance_gate_engine
Changed registry to file_per_module with atomic writes instead of single JSON file
Added ui_transport with REST endpoints, websocket events, file watcher, and reconnection
Added Remediation History tab and Evidence Bundle tab to UI views
Added circuit breaker settings to config defaults
Added state machine timeouts to config defaults
Added disallowed_patterns to ollama_worker_adapter
Added event_streaming to agent_swarm_integration (bidirectional)
Added streamTaskEvents and requestRemediationGuidance adapter functions
Added ambiguity_resolution to meta section
Added contract_versioning section with migration strategy
Added logs_decisions, logs_failed_attempts, claims_locks paths
Worker result evidence now includes model_used, prompt_hash, write_scope, files_written_log

execution_phases.name: Create root and copy local AgentSwarm
tasks: Create C:/SkynetFactory folder structure including all paths in folder_structure_required
Verify local AgentSwarm source exists at C:/Agent-Swarm_ref/agent-swarm-main/agent-swarm-main
Copy or mirror local source into C:/SkynetFactory/orchestration/agent-swarm
Keep original reference copy untouched
Initialize git repo in C:/SkynetFactory if not already a repo

Working copy exists
Reference copy remains untouched
Git repo initialized

sample_module_contract.purpose: Verify copied artifacts against checksum manifests to detect data corruption or tampering in backup, deployment, and migration workflows.

endpoints.description: Check status of a running verification task.

agent_usage.when_to_use: When you need to verify that files were copied or transferred without corruption. Ideal after backup operations, deployment pushes, or data migrations.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: When you need semantic content validation, format conversion verification, or comparison of file meaning rather than byte-level integrity.

failure_modes.condition: Manifest file not found or unreadable
failure_modes.recovery: Ensure manifest path is correct and file is readable

failure_modes.symptom: failure entry in result listing missing file path
failure_modes.recovery: Restore or re-provision the missing artifact

forbidden_behaviors.description: Do not modify source artifacts being verified
Do not perform semantic content validation
Do not require external network access

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Use Node crypto module to compute checksums. Keep API small and deterministic. Support streaming verification for large files.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Large manifests may cause memory pressure — consider streaming the manifest parse.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Streaming checksum computation with async generators
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Loading entire files into memory before hashing

success_definition: Codex can build the system by reading this JSON plus a minimal prompt
AgentSwarm local repo is reused instead of rebuilding orchestration
Module contracts can be authored consistently and validated against proper JSON Schema
A pending contract can become a verified registered module
Ollama workers can implement modules with low temperature and seed control
Final gates prevent false completion, including forbidden_behavior_validation
Concurrency is safe — only one worker per module_id at a time
Remediation includes rollback to clean state via git worktrees
UI shows module progress, health indicators, and final verification
Rejected modules can be revived with new versions
The system can continue generating reusable modules over time
All state transitions have timeouts and guard conditions — no stuck states
Evidence bundles provide full audit trail for every module attempt
